<blockquote>[[File:Doggy Tools talent 1.gif|thumb|When attacking, Dogs with any weapon in their toolbar will find and equip the closest weapon from the left.]] [[File:Doggy Tools talent 2.gif|thumb|Dogs with a Hoe inside the toolbar will help their owner farm/harvest wheat & rice.]]Allows your Dog to utilize specific tools to help you with certain tasks. Tools can be added to your Dog's toolbar, which can be accessed by '''<code>Right-clicking</code>''' your Dog with any variation of the Pickaxe.   

The higher the level, the greater the capacity of the toolbar.  

Dogs with a Stone Hoe inside the toolbar along with [[Rice Grains]] or Wheat Seeds will help you harvest '''Rice''' and Wheat respectively (if both is present in the Dog's toolbar, it will choose left-most item).  

Dogs with any weapon (Axes, Swords, Bows, Tridents and Crossbows) in their toolbar will find and equip the left-most weapon. 

* Arrows for the Bow and Crossbow can be stored either in the toolbar or in [[Pack Puppy]]<nowiki/>'s inventory.
* Trident can only be used as a Ranged Attack weapon if enchanted with Loyalty 2 or greater, it can still be used as a Melee weapon otherwise.</blockquote>

=== When farming ===
Make sure you:

* Set your dog's mode to '''Docile'''.
* Put at least Rice Grains (or Wheat Seed) in [[Doggy Tools]] Toolbar, not [[Pack Puppy]]<nowiki/>'s inventory.
* Use Stone Hoe.
* Always Pick First Slot set to False.

[[File:Doggy Tool talent 3.gif|thumb|2 Dogs decimating a Vindicator using Bows and Tridents]]

== Trivia ==

* It was added in DTN 1.12.0.
* There's an instance where '''Doggy Tools''' desync when [[Immortal Dogs]] is disabled, it's recommended to keep [[Immortal Dogs]] on.
